steps.title: Match the singular subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is the country's name, which is singular. The sentence needs a singular finite verb before pronounced.

steps.title: Reject plural verb forms
steps.content: Choice A is plural and does not agree with the singular subject. Choice B is also plural. Choice C is plural progressive and still does not agree. The singular verb form makes the sentence read correctly: the country's name is pronounced Kiribas. The answer is D.
